title: Obsidian Office: Executive Workspaces That Signal Power
description: A premium office design firm specializing in environments engineered to project authority and influence.
goal: Attract executive clients seeking to elevate perceived authority through workspace design.
offer: Custom office environments using psychological design principles to enhance presence, control, and decision-making influence.
misconception: Most believe authority comes from titles, not realizing environment plays a critical role in perception.
targetAudience: CEOs, founders, and executives who operate in high-stakes decision-making environments.
